narrative:
Reminderville City has 3,436 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.9 percentage points.
